changes.summary: New BC-11 SubmitTeamJoinRequestUseCase with execute() for submit flow: community validation, membership/pending checks, request creation, lead/member notifications. Exports createSubmitTeamJoinRequestUseCase factory.

New BC-11 ApproveTeamJoinRequestUseCase with execute() for approve flow: load pending request via injected helper, membership check, inviteToTeam, deferred event RSVP, status update, applicant/lead notifications, project member_joined. Exports TeamJoinRequestLeadAction type and createApproveTeamJoinRequestUseCase factory.

New BC-11 RejectTeamJoinRequestUseCase with execute() for reject flow: load pending request via injected helper, status update, applicant notification, resolve admin notifications. Exports createRejectTeamJoinRequestUseCase factory.

Extracted P-9 loadPendingJoinRequestForLead helper (shared by approve/reject use cases via injected callback). TeamJoinRequestService.submitRequest, approveRequest, rejectRequest delegate to respective use cases. Query/cancel/resolve helpers remain in service.
Documented BC-11/P-9 delegation on submitTeamRequest, approveTeamRequest, rejectTeamRequest endpoints; router continues to call TeamJoinRequestService which forwards to use cases.

notes: Use cases not registered in _bootstrap.ts (outside write_set). communities.router still calls TeamJoinRequestService.submitRequest which forwards to SubmitTeamJoinRequestUseCase. Pattern mirrors p6a-team-invitation-helpers (P-8).
